quiz.introTitle: Let's see what you already know
quiz.introBody: This isn't a test — there's no pass or fail. Answer what you can and skip anything you're unsure about. It just helps us find the best place for you to start.
quiz.introTitle_progress: Let's see how far you've come
quiz.introBody_progress: No pass or fail here either — just answer what you can. It shows us how much you've learned since you started.

results.subExplorer: Great start — we'll build on this as you learn.
results.subInvestor: Good baseline. We'll tailor your learning from here.
results.progress_subExplorer: Brilliant — your knowledge is levelling up!
results.progress_subInvestor: Solid progress. We'll keep refining your learning from here.

progressCheck.cardBody_explorer: You've been learning for a while — want to see how much you've grown?
progressCheck.cardBody_investor: Time for a quick progress check. See how far you've come.
